Tons of black walnut all over. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.

The berry bushes are located at the old Rocky Point Amusement Park.  There is plenty of parking.  It has a nice trail for walking or jogging.  The berry bushes are plentiful along the walking path. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
